report.summary: DEPLOY UNBLOCKED — 9cc38d1 live on Vercel (48cR1QbfG). All 1,324 pages published. 186 page.tsx on disk (+5 since v7). 5 new learn guides built. 57 agent runs today ($5,470 human-equivalent). New critical: 111 published slugs have no page.tsx — will 404.

sections.title: Analytics
items: 186 page.tsx files on disk (+5 since v7). New guides: MEV Supply Chain & PBS, Governance Markets & Liquid Lockers, On-Chain Analysis & Smart Money, Lombard Finance LBTC, Wormhole Cross-Chain, Resolv USR Delta-Neutral, Token Unlocks & Vesting.

DEPLOY RESTORED: Commit 9cc38d1 deployed successfully to Vercel in 3m 35s (deployment 48cR1QbfG). Fixes missing module imports in DVT and MiCA learn pages. Production now current after 4 consecutive build failures resolved.
All 1,324 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 770 at v7). Queue fully empty — no blocked items remain.
187 static pages generated on Vercel build. 1,215 entries in page manifest. 17 API routes all healthy.
NEW RISK: 111 published slugs have NO page.tsx on disk — these will 404 in production now that all pages are published. Covers blog/*, learn/*, investing/best/*, compare/* categories.
Middleware SEO concern escalated: with all 1,324 pages published, ~700+ getting noindex from pillar-page gating is now a critical issue, not just a carry-over.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since v7 (10:09 UTC): 3 build cycles (5 new learn guides), 2 design cycles, 2 eod cycles, 3 publish cycles ran. Deploy pipeline fully restored.
SHIPPED: Production deploy (9cc38d1) — all 4 prior build failures resolved. Full 1,324-page publish promotion complete. 187 static pages generating successfully.

New pages this cycle: MEV Supply Chain/PBS Guide, Governance Markets/Liquid Lockers Guide, On-Chain Analysis/Smart Money Guide, Lombard LBTC Guide, Wormhole Cross-Chain Guide, Resolv USR Guide, Token Unlocks Guide.
RESOLVED from v7: (1) Deploy pipeline unblocked, (2) Publish queue cleared (was 2 blocked items).

CARRY-OVER blockers: (1) 111 published slugs missing page.tsx — 404 risk, (2) Middleware SEO — ~700 pages noindex, (3) 138 TS errors in 4 files, (4) /defi-yields no fallback data, (5) /news-rss no in-memory cache.
Today's cumulative: 13 build cycles (19+ learn guides), 11 design cycles, 12 eod cycles, 8 publish cycles, 13 standup cycles = 57 total agent runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. SCAFFOLD MISSING PAGE.TSX: 111 published slugs will 404 now that all 1,324 pages are published and deploy is live. Prioritize highest-traffic categories (learn/*, compare/*) first. This is the new #1 blocker.

2. FIX MIDDLEWARE SEO: ~700 pages getting noindex from pillar-page gating. With full publish complete and deploy live, this is now actively suppressing search indexing. Auto-sync PILLAR_PAGES with PUBLISHED_PAGES or remove gating.
3. CLEAN TS ERRORS: 138 errors in 4 files (Lido V3 94, structured-data 36, crypto-arbitrage 4, RWA yield 4). All JSX/HTML entity issues — mechanical fix, quick win to clean build pipeline.
